results.title: India's Got Latent 2: Kiku Sharda, Haarsh Limbachiyaa brutally roast Samay Raina: 'He has a monthly pass to court'
results.description: Samay Raina was roasted by Kiku Sharda and Harssh Limbachiyaa in the latest India's Got Latent Season 2 episode, with the comedians joking about the legal controversy that followed the show's first season.

results.title: agra-wife-buried-husband-in-bathroom-and-bathed-same-spot-every-day
results.description: ಆಗ್ರಾದ ಸಿಕಂದ್ರಾ ಪೊಲೀಸ್ ಠಾಣಾ ವ್ಯಾಪ್ತಿಯ ದಹತೋರಾ ರೇಣುಕಾಧಾಮ್ ಕಾಲೋನಿಯಲ್ಲಿ ಈ ಕೊಲೆ ಪ್ರಕರಣ ನಡೆದಿದೆ.
